item.description:
Release v4.5.0

Changes since v4.4.0

  • document: update documentation
  • feat: add xcassets asset catalog preview support
  • feat(app-store-connect): add API disk cache and improve loading UX
  • feat(app-store-connect): add create version flow with smart defaults
  • feat(app-store-connect): add HTML cover art docs and agent tools
  • feat(app-store-connect): add production screenshot preview cache
  • feat(app-store-connect): improve cover art preview and toolbar styling
  • feat(app-store-connect): persist selected app and add cover art scaffold
  • feat(app-store-connect): refactor cover art around device families
  • feat(app-store-connect): reorganize views and polish distribution workflow
  • feat(chat-section): add header and toolbar chrome with plugin injection
  • feat(editor-swift): add build and run for Xcode and SPM projects
  • feat(editor-swift): show build logs in bottom panel instead of sheet
  • feat(llm-provider-zhipu): enhance API request to mimic Claude Code behavior
  • feat(message-list): add subtle gradient background to chat message area
  • feat(model-selector): restore per-model TPS display from chat history
  • feat(model-selector): show current model TPS in chat toolbar
  • fix: normalize log messages to follow SuperLog convention
  • fix(app-store-connect): adjust cover art page spacing and localization catalog
  • fix(app-store-connect): hide screenshot device picker when only one size
